subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! The servant presented himself and read thy letter in the presence of this Wronged One, from which was inhaled the fragrance of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی عبد حاضر بکتابت حاضر و نزد مظلوم قرائت نمود عرف محبت از او استشمام
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
